Variables.Name: bMature
Variables.Description: true if this dialogue is considered to contain matureadult content.

Variables.Name: SpokenText
Variables.Description: A localized version of the text that is actually spoken phonetically in the audio.

Variables.Name: SubtitleOverride
Variables.Description: A localized version of the subtitle text that should be displayed for this audio. By default this will be the same as the Spoken Text.

Variables.Name: ContextMappings
Variables.Description: Mappings between dialogue contexts and associated soundwaves.

Variables.Name: VoiceActorDirection
Variables.Description: Provides general notes to the voice actor intended to direct their performance, as well as contextual information to the translator.
